titleStmt.title: SII 17.677: original edition by K. G. Krishnan
No. 677. (A.R. No. 621 of 1904.) NĀGALĀPURAM, TIRUVALLUR TALUK, CHINGLEPUT DISTRICT.

summary.p: On the north, west and the south walls of the Vēdavallittāyār shrine in the Vēdanārāyaṇasvāmin temple.

This inscription in Śanskrit verse describes at the beginning the lineage and exploits of the king. The details of date given, viz., Śaka 1436, Bhāva, Kārttika, utthānadvādaśī, Friday, Rēvatī, correspond to 1514 A.D., October 30, Monday and not Friday, ·50; ·97.

It records the gift by the king, of the village called Dēvarāyakuppam named as Kṛishṇarāyapuram in Nārāyaṇapurappaṟṟu, in Nirṇaiyūr (Niṉṟaiyūr)-nāḍu in Kuṉṟavarddhanakōṭṭa in Chandragiri-rājya in Tuṇḍīra-maṇḍalam as sarvamānya to god Kariyamāṇikka Perumāḷ in Arigaṇḍapuram. The document is stated to have been composed by Mallaṇāchārya.

revisionDesc.change: Further conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)
Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

p.hi: śubhamastu . harērllīlā varāhasya daṭhaṣṭrādaṇḍassa pātu vaḥ . hēmādrikalaśā yatra dhātrīśchatraśriyandadhau . 1 kalyāṇāyāstu taddhāma pratyūhatimirāpaham . yatgajōpyagajōtbhūtam hariṇāpi ca pūjyatē . 2 Asti kṣīramayāddēvai rmmathyamānānmahāmbudhēḥ . navanītamivōt bhūta mapanīta tamō mahaḥ . 3 tasyāsīttanayastapōbhiratulaira

rtthanāmā budhaḥ puṇyairasya purūravā bhujabalairāyurdviṣānnighnataḥ . tasyāyurnnahuṣōsya tasya paruṣō yuddhē yayātiḥ kṣitau khyātastasya tu turvvasu rvvasunibhaḥ śrīdē(da)vayānīpatēḥ [.4*.] tadvaṅśē dēvakī jānirddidīpē timmabhūpatiḥ . yaśasvītuluvēndrēṣu yadōḥ kṛṣṇa Ivā

5 tatōbhūt bukkamājāni rīśvara kṣitipālakaḥ . Atrā samaguṇabhraṅśam maundiratnam mahībhujām . 6 sarasādudabhū ttasmā nnarasā vanipālakaḥ . dēvakī nandanāt kāmō dēvakīnandanādiva . 7 kāvērī māśu baddhvā bahuḷa jalacarām yō vilaṅghyaiva śatrum jīvagrāha grahītvā samiti bhujabalāntañca rājyam tadīyam . kṛtvā śrīraṅga

pūrvvantadapi nijavaśē paṭṭaṇam yō babhāsē kīrttistambha nnighāya tribhuvana bhavana stūyamānāpadānaḥ . 8 cērañcōḷañca pāṇḍyantamapica madhurāvallabham mānabhūṣam vīryyōdagranturuṣkam gajapatinṛpatiñcāpi jitvā tadanyān . Āgaṅgātīra laṅkā prathama caramabhūbhṛt taṭāntam nitāntam khyātaḥ kṣōṇīpatīnām srajamiva śirasām śāsanam yō vyatānīt . 9 vividhasukṛtagrāmē rāmēśvara pramukhē muhurmmudita hṛdayaḥ sthānē sthānē vyadhatta yathāvidhi . budhaparivṛtō nānādānāni yō bhuvi ṣōḍaśa tribhuvanakanōtgītam sphītam yaśaḥ punaruktayan . 10 tippājī nāgalādēvyōḥ kausalyā śrīsumitrayōḥ . dēvyōriva nṛsiṅhēndrāttasmāt paṅktirathādiva . 11 vīrau vinayinau rāmalakṣmaṇāviva nandanau . jātau vīranṛsiṅhēndra kṛṣṇarāya mahīpatī . 12 vīra śrīnārasiṅhassa vijayanagarē ratnasiṅhāsanasthaḥ kīrttyā nītyā nirasya nnṛganaḷa nahuṣā napyavanyāmathānyān . Āsētō rāsumērō

ravanisuranutaḥ svairamācōdayādrē rāpāścātyācalāntādyakhila hṛdaya māvarjya rājyam śaśāsa . 13 nānādānānyakārṣīt kanakasadasi yā śrīvirūpākṣa dēvasthānē śrīkāḷahastīśiturapi nagarē vēṅkaṭādrau ca kāñcyām . śrīśailē śōṇaśailē mahati hariharēhōbaḷē saṅgamē ca śrīraṅgē kumbhaghōṇē hananamasi mahā nanditīrthē nivṛttau . 14 gōkarṇē rāmasētau jagati taditarēṣvapyaśēṣēṣu puṇyasthānēṣvārabdha nānāvidhabahaḷa mahādānavāri pravāhaiḥ . yasyōdañcatturaṅga prakara purarajaśśuṣyadambhōdhimagna kṣmābhṛt pakṣaścidōdyattarakuliśadharōtkaṇṭhitā kuṇṭhitābhūt . 15 brahmāṇḍam viśvacakram ghaṭamudita mahābhūtakam ratnadhēnum saptāmbhōdhiñca kalpakṣitiruhalatikē kāñcanīm kāma dhēnum . sarṇakṣmām yō hiraṇyāśvarathamapi tulāpūruṣam gōsa hasram hēmāśvam hēmagarbham kanakakariratham pañcalāṅgalyatānīt . 16 prājyam praśāsya nirvighnam rājyam jyāmiva śāsitum . tasmin guṇēna vikhyātē kṣitērindrē divam

gatē . 17 tatōpyavārya vīryaśrīḥ kṛṣṇarāya mahīpatiḥ . bibharti maṇikēyūranirviśēṣam mahīm bhujē . 18 kīrtyā yasya samantataḥ prasṛtayā viśvam jēdityāśaṅkya purā purārirabhavat phālēkṣaṇaḥ prāyaśaḥ . patmākṣōpi caturbhujōjani caturvaktrōbhavat patmabhūḥ kābī khaṭgamadhādramāca kamalam vīṇāñca vāṇīkarē . 19 śatrūṇām vāsamētē tadata Iti ruṣākinnu saptāmburāśi rnnānā śēnāturaṅgatruṭita vasumatī dhūbikāpābikābhiḥ . saṅśōṣya svairamētat pratinidhijaladhiśrēṇikā yō vidhattē brahmāṇḍa svarṇamē ru pramukha nija mahādānatōyai ramēyaiḥ . 20 maddattāmartthi sārthāḥ śrīyamiha suciram bhuṅjatāmityavētya prāyaḥ pratyūha hētōḥ tattatdit jaitravṛttyāpica birudapadai raṅkitāstatra tatra staṅbhān jātapratiṣṭhān vyatanuta bhuvi yōbhūbhṛda bhram

kaṣāgrān [.21*] kāṭhacī śrīśaila śōṇācala kanakasabhā vēṅka(ṭa)ṭātri pramukhyēṣvāvarttāvarttya sarvēṣvatanuta vidhivat bhūyasē śrēyasē yaḥ . dēvasthānēṣu tīrtthēṣvapica kanakatulāpūruṣādīni nānādānānyē vōpadānai rapi sammakhilai rāgamōktāni tāni [.22*] rōṣakṛtaprati pārtthivadaṇḍa śśēṣabhuja kṣitirakṣaṇa śauṇḍaḥ [.] bhāṣagē tappuvarāyara gaṇḍastōṣa kṛdartthiṣu yō raṇacaṇḍaḥ . 23 rājādhirāja Ityuktō yō rājaparamēśvaraḥ . mūvarāyara gaṇḍaśca pararājabhayaṅkaraḥ . 24 Indurāyasuratrāṇō duṣṭaśārdūla mardanaḥ . gajaukha gaṇḍabhēruṇḍa Ityādi birudānvitaḥ [.25*] Ālōkaya mahārāya jayajīvētivādibhiḥ . Aṅgavaṅga kabiṅgādyai rājabhissēvyatē varaḥ . 26 satyaudāryassudhībhissa vijaya nagarē ratnasiṅhāsanasthaḥ kṣmāpālān kṛṣṇarāya kṣitipatiradharīkṛtya nītyā nṛgādīn . Āpūrvvādrērathāstakṣitidharakaṭakādāca hēmācalāntādāsē tōrabdhisārthaśriyamiha

bahabīkṛtya kīrttyā samindhē . 27 śālīvāhana nistrītē śakābdē sacatuśśataiḥ . ṣaṭ triṅśatāca saṅyuktaissaṅkhyātē daśabhiśśattaiḥ . 28 bhāvasaṅvatsarē māsi kārttikē bhṛguvāsarē . rēvatyāmapi puṇyā yāmutthānadvādaśī tithau [.29*] tuṅgabhadrāpagātīrē viṭhṭhalēśvara sannidhau . khyātasya kariyamāṇikkavērumābiti bhūtalē . 30 Arigaṇḍapurasthasya sudhāhārasya śārṅgiṇaḥ . tuṇḍīramaṇḍalē khyātam candragi(ri)ryyākhya rājyakam . 31 kuṇḍavarddhana kōṭastham nirṇaiyūr nāḍukē sthitam . nārāyaṇapurappa

bhūṣaṇatva mupāśritam . 32 prācīmāśāntirukkāri karaigrāmasamaāśritam . vēdādri kānanōddēśā ndakṣiṇasyaāndiśisthitam . 33 Arigaṇḍapurābhikhyām grāmavaryyācca paścimam . karaṇīsaritaścāpi diśamāśritamuttarām . 34 kṛṣṇarāyapurañcēti pratināma samāśritam . sarvvaśasyāciē�ta ndēvarāyakuppam manōramam . 35 sarvvamānyam catussī māsaṅyutañca samantataḥ . nidhinikṣēpapāṣāṇa siddhasāddhyañjalā

bhūruham . vāpīkūpataṭākaiśca kaśchēnāpi samanvitam . 37 dānasyā dhamanasyāpi vikrayasyāpi cōcitam . parītaḥ prayataiḥ snigdhapurōhita purōgamaiḥ . budhaiḥ śrautapathagai radhigērgirā . 38 pātivratyaguṇā kīrttyārundhatī manurundhatī . pēru(mā)mānācca yārindhē yēnaputravatī satī . 39 Arigaṇḍapurādhīśastiruvēṅkaṭanāyakaḥ* yam prasūyava satyantaḥ sanjayattyēna putriṇam . 40 sāhityasaāra . sauhityabhājā bhōjā[nukāriṇā .] śrīmatpaddhamalaṇṇēna cōditastēna dhīmatā . 41 kṛṣṇadēva mahārāyō mānanīyō manasvinām . sahiraṇya payōdhārā pūrvakandattavān mudā . 42 taditamavanīvanīpaka vinutasārasya kṛṣṇarāyasya . śāsanamatibala śāsanatarukaradānasya sāvadhānasya . 43 kṛṣṇadēva mahārāya śāsanēna sabhāpatiḥ . Abhāṇin mudrasandarbham kathitam tāmraśāsanam . 44 kṛṣṇadēva mahārāyabhūmipālasya śāsanāt . malmaṇā cārivaryyēṇa likhitantāmraśāsanam . 45 Ēkaivabhaginī lōkē sarvvēṣā mēva bhūbhujām . na bhōjyāna karagrāhyā

dēvadattā vasundharā [.46*] dānapālanayō rmmaddhyē dānāt śrēyōnu pālanam . dānāt svargamavāpnōti pālanādacyutam padam . 47 svadattāt dviguṇam puṇyam paradattānupālanam . paratattāpahārañcasvadattanniṣphalam bhavēt . 48 sāmānyōyam dharmmasēturnṛpāṇām kālē kālē pālanīyō bhavatbhiḥ . sarvvānētān bhāvinaḥ pārtthivēndrān bhūyō bhūyō yācatē rāmacandraḥ [.49*]

div.p: Digital edition of SII 17.677 by converted to DHARMA conventions by Emmanuel Francis.
